source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Working with Filters: Joining, dict/list conversion, and set operations

questions.q: Which filter joins list elements into a single string with a separator?
Which filter turns a dictionary into a list of key/value items?
questions.why: my_dictionary|dict2items yields a list of {key, value} entries.

questions.q: Which filter turns a list of items back into a dictionary?
In dict2items/items2dict, what do key_name and value_name do?
options: Name which fields hold the key and the value in the transformation
questions.why: You can specify the names of the key and value fields used in the conversion.

questions.q: Which filter merges two lists into one (all unique values from both)?
questions.why: a|union(b) is the set union of the two lists.

questions.q: Which filter keeps only values present in BOTH lists?
Which filter keeps only the values in the first list that are NOT in the second?
questions.why: a|difference(b) subtracts b's values from a.

questions.q: Which filter removes duplicate values from a list?
